message:
refactor: strip imperative Go from Doctor Dog, delegate to formula (gt-oetc)

Replace 565 lines of imperative health check code in doctor_dog.go with a
thin ticker that pours a mol-dog-doctor molecule for agent execution. The
daemon now schedules the check; agents (Deacon) execute the formula steps
(probe, inspect, report) declaratively.

Removed: TCP checks, SQL latency probes, zombie detection, backup freshness
checks, disk usage queries, recommendation engine, JSON report writer, and
all associated report types. These are now the responsibility of the agent
executing the mol-dog-doctor formula.

Kept: DoctorDogConfig, interval/database/threshold helpers (used by daemon
config and molecule variable injection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
